attributes.description: Single namespace deep dive with CPU/memory trends, pod resource usage, container restart tracking, memory composition, and network I/O.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.namespace.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), names = VALUES(k8s.namespace.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " namespaces"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.namespace.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), names = VALUES(k8s.namespace.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " namespaces"))
| KEEP name

embeddableConfig.description: Namespace name for the selected drilldown target.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name
| RENAME k8s.namespace.name AS name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.namespace.name
| RENAME k8s.namespace.name AS name
| LIMIT 1

embeddableConfig.description: Shortcut to open Discover for logs related to this namespace.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase_num = LAST(k8s.namespace.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.namespace.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), phase = MAX(phase_num)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Active",
    "Terminated"
  )
| KEEP phase

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.phase IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase_num = LAST(k8s.namespace.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.namespace.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), phase = MAX(phase_num)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Active",
    "Terminated"
  )
| KEEP phase

attributes.description: Namespace phase for the selected namespace, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

embeddableConfig.description: Namespace phase for the selected namespace, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
      `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
      `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs requests & limits
embeddableConfig.description: Shows namespace CPU usage compared with requested and limited CPU over time. Usage near limits can indicate throttling risk.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      `Memory requests` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_request),
      `Memory limits` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_limit)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      `Memory requests` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_request),
      `Memory limits` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_limit)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set vs requests & limits
embeddableConfig.description: Shows namespace memory working set compared with requested and limited memory over time. Working set near limits can indicate OOM risk.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | STATS total = SUM(cpu_limit)
  | EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total, 2)
  | KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | STATS total = SUM(cpu_limit)
  | EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total, 2)
  | KEEP total_cores

embeddableConfig.description: Total CPU limit across all containers in this namespace, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | STATS total = SUM(mem_limit)
  | EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
  | KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | STATS total = SUM(mem_limit)
  | EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
  | KEEP total_gb

embeddableConfig.description: Total memory limit across all containers in this namespace, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | STATS total = SUM(vol_cap)
  | EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
  | KEEP total_gb

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
      last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
  | INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
  | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  | STATS total = SUM(vol_cap)
  | EVAL total_gb = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total) / 1073741824.0, 2)
  | KEEP total_gb

embeddableConfig.description: Total volume capacity across all pods in this namespace, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    avg_limit = AVG(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_usage = MAX(avg_usage),
    pod_limit = SUM(avg_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, timestamp
| STATS total_usage = SUM(total_usage),
    total_limit = SUM(pod_limit)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(total_limit > 0, total_usage / total_limit, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS cpu_util = ROUND(AVG(total_usage) / AVG(total_limit), 4),
    cpu_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP cpu_util, cpu_util_last, max_val

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    avg_limit = AVG(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_usage = MAX(avg_usage),
    pod_limit = SUM(avg_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, timestamp
| STATS total_usage = SUM(total_usage),
    total_limit = SUM(pod_limit)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(total_limit > 0, total_usage / total_limit, NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS cpu_util = ROUND(AVG(total_usage) / AVG(total_limit), 4),
    cpu_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP cpu_util, cpu_util_last, max_val

embeddableConfig.description: Average namespace CPU utilization versus limits for the selected time range. "Last value vs Avg" compares the latest bucket to that average. Values near 100% can indicate CPU saturation.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_avail = AVG(k8s.volume.available),
    avg_cap = AVG(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name,
    timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_avail = SUM(avg_avail),
    total_cap = SUM(avg_cap)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(total_cap > 0, 1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap), NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS vol_util = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_avail)) / TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_cap)), 4),
    vol_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP vol_util, vol_util_last, max_val

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_avail = AVG(k8s.volume.available),
    avg_cap = AVG(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name,
    timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_avail = SUM(avg_avail),
    total_cap = SUM(avg_cap)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(total_cap > 0, 1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap), NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS vol_util = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_avail)) / TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_cap)), 4),
    vol_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP vol_util, vol_util_last, max_val

embeddableConfig.description: Average namespace volume utilization for the selected time range. "Last value vs Avg" compares the latest bucket to that average. Values near 100% can indicate disk pressure.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    avg_limit = AVG(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_ws = MAX(avg_ws),
    pod_limit = SUM(avg_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, timestamp
| STATS total_ws = SUM(total_ws),
    total_limit = SUM(pod_limit)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(total_limit > 0, TO_DOUBLE(total_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(total_limit), NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS mem_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_ws)) / TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_limit)), 4),
    mem_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP mem_util, mem_util_last, max_val

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    avg_limit = AVG(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name,
    timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS total_ws = MAX(avg_ws),
    pod_limit = SUM(avg_limit)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, timestamp
| STATS total_ws = SUM(total_ws),
    total_limit = SUM(pod_limit)
  BY timestamp
| EVAL bucket_util = CASE(total_limit > 0, TO_DOUBLE(total_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(total_limit), NULL)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS mem_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_ws)) / TO_DOUBLE(AVG(total_limit)), 4),
    mem_util_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP mem_util, mem_util_last, max_val

embeddableConfig.description: Average namespace memory working set utilization versus limits for the selected time range. "Last value vs Avg" compares the latest bucket to that average. Values near 100% can indicate memory pressure.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity), vol_avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name,
      @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS vol_cap = SUM(vol_cap), vol_avail = SUM(vol_avail)
    BY @timestamp
  | EVAL vol_usage = vol_cap - vol_avail
  | SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, vol_usage

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS vol_cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity), vol_avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name,
      @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS vol_cap = SUM(vol_cap), vol_avail = SUM(vol_avail)
    BY @timestamp
  | EVAL vol_usage = vol_cap - vol_avail
  | SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, vol_usage

embeddableConfig.title: Volume usage over time
embeddableConfig.description: Shows persistent volume usage in this namespace over time. Watch for usage approaching capacity.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS pod_count = COUNT(*) BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, pod_count

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS pod_count = COUNT(*) BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp
  | KEEP @timestamp, pod_count

embeddableConfig.title: Pod count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Shows pod count in this namespace over time. Sudden changes can indicate scaling, rollout, or crash/restart activity.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
      `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
      `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
      Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

embeddableConfig.description: Shows pod memory composition in this namespace over time: RSS, working set, and available memory. Watch for rising working set or falling available memory.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
  | EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive","Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
  | EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive","Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
  | KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

embeddableConfig.description: Shows namespace pod network throughput in and out over time. Watch for unexpected spikes or sustained high throughput.
embeddableConfig.title: Network I/O

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
  | STATS pod_cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name,
      timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS cpu_usage = MAX(pod_cpu_usage)
    BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp
  | SORT timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC
  | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, timestamp, cpu_usage

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
  | STATS pod_cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name,
      timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS cpu_usage = MAX(pod_cpu_usage)
    BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp
  | SORT timestamp ASC, cpu_usage DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC
  | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, timestamp, cpu_usage

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by CPU usage
embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top pods by CPU usage in this namespace over time. Use this to find pods consuming the most CPU.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
  | STATS pod_mem_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name,
      timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS mem_ws = MAX(pod_mem_ws)
    BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp
  | SORT timestamp ASC, mem_ws DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC
  | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, timestamp, mem_ws

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
  | STATS pod_mem_ws = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name,
      timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS mem_ws = MAX(pod_mem_ws)
    BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp
  | SORT timestamp ASC, mem_ws DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC
  | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, timestamp, mem_ws

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by memory usage
embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top pods by memory working set in this namespace over time. Use this to find pods consuming the most memory.

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  | STATS container_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name,
      timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | STATS restarts = SUM(container_restarts)
    BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp
  | SORT timestamp ASC, restarts DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC
  | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, timestamp, restarts

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL

    BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp

  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, timestamp, restarts

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by container restarts
embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top pods by container restarts in this namespace over time. Restart spikes can indicate unstable containers.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase_num = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    node_name_values = VALUES(k8s.node.name),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit_util = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization),
    restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0)),
  phase = CASE(
    phase_num == 1, "Pending",
    phase_num == 2, "Running",
    phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase_num == 4, "Failed",
    phase_num == 5, "Unknown",
    "Unknown"
  ),
  k8s.node.name = MV_FIRST(node_name_values)
| KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name, restarts, phase, cpu_usage, mem_ws, mem_limit_util
| SORT restarts DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase_num = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    node_name_values = VALUES(k8s.node.name),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    mem_limit_util = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization),
    restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL restarts = COALESCE(restarts, TO_LONG(0)),
  phase = CASE(
    phase_num == 1, "Pending",
    phase_num == 2, "Running",
    phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase_num == 4, "Failed",
    phase_num == 5, "Unknown",
    "Unknown"
  ),
  k8s.node.name = MV_FIRST(node_name_values)
| KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.node.name, restarts, phase, cpu_usage, mem_ws, mem_limit_util
| SORT restarts DESC, k8s.pod.name ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Pods
embeddableConfig.description: Pods in this namespace, ranked by container restarts (highest first). Click a pod name to drill into pod details, or a node name to drill into node details. Phase reflects the latest collected value. Avg CPU usage, avg memory working set and avg memory limit utilization are averaged over the selected time range. Container restarts = sum across all containers over the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase == 2
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL

| STATS phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND phase == 2
| STATS count = COUNT(*)
